description: SpiraPlan MCP Server - project management, requirements, incidents, tasks, test cases, and releases for SpiraPlan/SpiraTeam.

authentication.notes: Generate from SpiraPlan user profile (My Profile > API Key).

known_issues.tls: Set NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED=0 for self-signed certs. Remove if public CA is used.

prerequisites: Valid user account with API key
setup.install: cd spira-mcp-server && npm install && npm run build
